headline: Incyte to Buy Vega Therapeutics in Hematology Deal Worth Up to $2B
summary: Incyte will acquire Vega Therapeutics for up to $2B, adding late-stage VWD candidate VGA039 and expanding its hematology growth prospects.

headline: Tango Therapeutics (TNGX) Stock Soars on Pancreatic Cancer Trial Results
summary: Tango Therapeutics shares rallied on Monday after recording impressive results for its pancreatic cancer drug. Here’s how you should play TNGX stock at current levels.
